user.title: Home Assistant Dashboard Studio
user.description: Registers dashboard studio panels in the sidebar. Each saved dashboard gets its own entry — no configuration.yaml entry required.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Dashboard Studio is already configured.

init.title: Restore default dashboard
init.description:
Deletes the **globally stored** workspace (all dashboards, visible to everyone in your household). The sidebar keeps one default dashboard with the bundled example.

**Note:** Unsaved editor changes are lost. Reload the page after resetting (F5).

data.confirm_reset: Yes, delete saved dashboards and restore default
